_description: Oracle ARB — fires only when edge table WR exceeds market implied WR by >=5pp. Tests if mispricing-based filter beats absolute edge threshold. HALTED (2026-04-11): rolling 8-trade -$200 circuit breaker + $1500 daily budget. Arb had an observed worst-6h of -$5,449 from strike-pinning chop; halt catches that mechanism.
